title: MD
biography: Ibn al-Nafis was an Arab physician who was the first to accurately describe pulmonary circulation - the passage of blood through the lungs - three centuries before William Harvey.
aiSummary: Ibn al-Nafis is a medicine specialist at Al-Mansuri Hospital. Based in Cairo.

timeline.title: Described pulmonary circulation
timeline.description: First accurate description of blood flow from the right ventricle through the lungs to the left ventricle
